About

Design Engineer with 5+ years of experience, known for pixel-perfect execution and strong attention to small details. Passionate about exploring new technologies and turning ideas into reality through polished, thoughtfully crafted personal projects. Creator of chanhdai.com (1.6k stars), React Wheel Picker (16k+ weekly downloads, ▲Vercel OSS Program), and ZaDark (80k+ downloads, 30k+ users) — peak metrics. Visit my portfolio website: chanhdai.com
